name: Memory (Brain)
description: Neuroscience-inspired persistent memory backed by the brain-memory CLI (~/.brain): deterministic recall, spreading activation, spaced reinforcement, and model-driven capture.

brainBin.description: Path or name of the brain binary (defaults to "brain" on PATH, from the brain-memory npm package).

project.description: Project label recorded on memory encoding contexts and used for context-dependent recall.

topRecall.description: Default number of memory_search results (and session-start context recall depth).

autoReinforce.description: Run `brain reinforce` on memories returned by memory_search (spaced reinforcement + Hebbian co-retrieval).

syncOnMemorize.description: Pass --sync to `brain memorize` so new memories push to Brain Cloud / the configured git remote.

brainBin.label: Brain binary
brainBin.help: Override when the brain-memory CLI is not on the Gateway's PATH.

syncOnMemorize.label: Sync after memorize
syncOnMemorize.help: Requires brain sync to be configured (Brain Cloud or a git remote).
